zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma DE THOUROTTE於1017年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易洛斯特時，她的父親Ithon DE THOUROTTE36歲，母親Gertrude DE LAON31歲。她於1033年與Wallerand DE COUCY結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。她去世於1074年在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma DE THOUROTTE于1017年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易洛斯特时，她的父亲Ithon DE THOUROTTE36岁，母亲Gertrude DE LAON31岁。她于1033年与Wallerand DE COUCY结婚。他们至少是6个女儿的父母。她去世于1074年在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma DE THOUROTTE was born in 1017, in Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Ithon DE THOUROTTE, was 36 and her mother, Gertrude DE LAON, was 31. She married Wallerand DE COUCY in 1033. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. She died in 1074, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma DE THOUROTTE est née en 1017, à Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Ithon DE THOUROTTE, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gertrude DE LAON, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Wallerand DE COUCY en 1033. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1074, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma DE THOUROTTE 1017 in Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithon DE THOUROTTE 36 und ihre Mutter Gertrude DE LAON 31. Sie hat 1033 Wallerand DE COUCY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1074 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma DE THOUROTTE è nata il nel 1017 nel Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Ithon DE THOUROTTE, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Gertrude DE LAON, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Wallerand DE COUCY nel 1033. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. Morì nel 1074, nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma DE THOUROTTEが1017年にフランスピカーディオイゼソウロットで生まれた時，父Ithon DE THOUROTTEは36歳，母Gertrude DE LAONは31歳であった。1033年にWallerand DE COUCYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1074年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma DE THOUROTTE(이)가 1017년 프랑스 피카디 이스 토우로트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithon DE THOUROTTE(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude DE LAON(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1033년 Wallerand DE COUCY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1074년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma DE THOUROTTE nasceu em 1017, em Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Ithon DE THOUROTTE, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude DE LAON, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Wallerand DE COUCY em 1033. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1074, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma DE THOUROTTE родилась в 1017 г. в местности тоуротт, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ithon DE THOUROTTE было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude DE LAON, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wallerand DE COUCY в 1033 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1074 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma DE THOUROTTE nació en 1017, en Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Ithon DE THOUROTTE, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gertrude DE LAON, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Wallerand DE COUCY en 1033. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijas. Murió en 1074, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
